title: ActivityRecord
description: An audit activity record from the Office 365 Management Activity API representing a user, admin, system, or policy action or event.

CreationTime.description: The date and time in UTC when the user performed the activity.

Id.description: Unique identifier of an audit record.

Operation.description: The name of the user or admin activity.

OrganizationId.description: The GUID for the organization's tenant.

RecordType.description: The type of operation indicated by the record.

ResultStatus.description: Indicates whether the action was successful or not.

UserKey.description: A unique ID for the user identified in the UserId property.

UserType.description: The type of user that performed the operation.

Workload.description: The Office 365 service where the activity occurred.

ClientIP.description: The IP address of the device used when the activity was logged.

ObjectId.description: The object that was accessed or modified by the activity.

UserId.description: The user who performed the action that resulted in the record being logged.
